message: New dataset: africa-comtrade-ethiopia-exports-by-commodity
title: New dataset: africa-comtrade-ethiopia-exports-by-commodity
description:
Ethiopia — Exports by Commodity (HS6) | Africa (UN Comtrade)
	

🌍 65,989 observations · 1 Africa countries · 2000–2023 · Repackaged by Electric Sheep Africa
    

	
		
	
	
		TL;DR
	

This dataset contains 65,989 observations of International merchandise trade data across 1 Africa countries, spanning 2000–2023, covering 4081 distinct indicators.

	
		
	
	
		About the source
	


Source: UN Comtrade
Publisher: United Nations Statistics Division (UN Comtrade)
License: other
Topic:… See the full description on the dataset page: https://huggingface.co/datasets/electricsheepafrica/africa-comtrade-ethiopia-exports-by-commodity.

message: New dataset: amharic-conversations
title: New dataset: amharic-conversations
description:
Amharic Conversations Dataset
	

Multi-turn conversations in Amharic about Ethiopian culture, history, geography, religion, food, sports, and daily life.

	
		
	
	
		Details
	


5,000 conversations
2-3 human turns per conversation
System prompt included
All human names stripped
Topics: Ethiopian history, culture, religion, geography, science, health, food, language, politics, environment, arts, sports, tourism


	
		
	
	
		Format
	

ShareGPT format for Unsloth/Llama-Factory… See the full description on the dataset page: https://huggingface.co/datasets/Muller01/amharic-conversations.
